posts.author: Shrish_Vaze
posts.community: JNK India ltd - Oil and Gas sector proxy?
posts.text: So, according to the management, 25-30% revenue growth guidance was based solely on the starting order book and new bookings have the potential to increase the revenue growth to 35% or as high as 60%. If they are able to do ~40% sales growth with 14% EBITDA margin then EBITDA can grow ~74% in FY27. PAT too can grow at a similar pace since finance costs are largely working capital based and will most likely scale up in line with revenue growth and depreciation is not too material given the nature of the business. At a P/E ratio of 42.8x and a potential PAT growth of ~74% if the export orders co…

posts.text: 30-35% topline growth for fy 27 without counting new orders.
